label: Accessibility
items: Modals now trap keyboard focus while open and return focus to where you were when they close — easier to navigate without a mouse.
Every close (✕) button across the app now has a screen-reader label.
New High Contrast toggle in Account Settings → Accessibility forces solid colours for secondary text and chips. Easier to read in bright sunlight or for users with low vision.

label: Photos Everywhere
items: New unified photo uploader: drag-and-drop, paste from clipboard, choose file, or take a photo with your camera.
Tasks can now carry a completion photo — open a completed task to attach a 'before/after' or any visual record.
Linking a plant to a Watchlist ailment now supports an evidence photo and freeform notes, so the issue is captured for next time.
New Photos tab on every plant — a chronological grid of journal photos, completed-task photos, and ailment evidence shots in one view, with a click-to-zoom lightbox.
